# didBecomeCurrent

**Type Property**

The identifier of the message that posts after a mouse becomes the most recently used mouse.

## Declaration

```swift
static var didBecomeCurrent: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<GCMouse.DidBecomeCurrentMessage> { get }
```
